description: DMV Revenue Reconciliation — reconciles daily fee collections, tracks outstanding balances, and generates revenue reports for treasury

hard_stops.label: Batch Total Mismatch
hard_stops.logic: Sum of individual transaction amounts does not match the payment processor batch total — discrepancy must be resolved before posting

hard_stops.label: Unallocated Payments Exceed Threshold
hard_stops.logic: Unallocated payments exceed $500 — all payments must be matched to transactions before closing the batch

soft_flags.label: Refunds Exceed Daily Average
soft_flags.logic: Daily refund total is more than 2x the rolling 30-day average — may indicate processing errors or fraud
